title: Authority Hierarchy & Lifecycle Diagrams
purpose: Generate authority hierarchy maps, runtime lifecycle diagrams, replay flow diagrams, enforcement flow diagrams, and healing flow diagrams.
architectural_constraints: All diagrams generated from canonical protocol definitions
Mermaid for markdown embedding, DOT for advanced rendering
Lifecycle diagrams must show all 9 states and valid transitions
acceptance_criteria: Authority hierarchy shows Layer 0-5 with precedence rules
Runtime lifecycle diagram shows all 9 states and transitions
Replay flow diagram shows event stream → reconstruction → validation
Enforcement flow diagram shows violation detection → blocking → reporting
All diagrams are deterministic and reproducible
